evals.name: install-dry-run-then-commit
evals.prompt: Enforce that a workload tolerating a taint also pins where it lands.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-scheduling preflight`, previews `cub-scheduling guardrails install` (dry-run: Trigger, spaces to wire, skips), then on confirmation `guardrails install --commit`. Trigger is Warn=true (advisory), not blocking by default.

evals.name: status
evals.prompt: Which workloads are flagged by the placement guardrails?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-scheduling guardrails status` and reports Units with ApplyWarnings/ApplyGates. Read-only.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Routes to scheduling-place to remediate (set-node-selector / set-node-affinity / a placement profile), rather than fixing from the guardrails skill.
